title: dicranoglossum subnudum
intro: Dicranoglossum subnudum, also known as the naked tongue fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dicranoglossum subnudum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make infusions or decoctions, and the plant is often combined with other medicinal herbs to enhance its effects.
